Inclusion_criteria: CDI ≥10 and HRSD ≥10; grades 7–12; living at home with parent/guardian; no psychotic or suicidal symptoms; not in psychotherapy
Dosage: 4 weeks; self-administered bibliotherapy; weekly monitoring calls

Inclusion_criteria: Depressive presentations / elevated depressive symptoms recognized by professionals (not explicitly severity-classified by authors).
No specific inclusion criteria regarding assessment;no depression severity threshold
Funding: Philanthropic (Buxton Family Foundation); University (UNSW Brain Sciences)

Inclusion_criteria: Girls had to score at or above the 70th percentile on depressive symptoms within the sample (RADS-2 score ≥ 59)
Funding: Behavioural Science Institute, Radboud University Nijmegen

Inclusion_criteria: Past-year physical peer violence (victimization or perpetration) with 5≤PHQ-9≤19
Dosage: 1 brief in-ED intervention session + 8 weeks automated text messaging
Funding: National Institute of Mental Health grants K23 MH095866, K24 HD062645, and K24DA027109

Inclusion_criteria: CES-D-based 1-page screener: endorsed ≥2 items; current MDD & acute SI excluded
MFQ-C≥ 20, students who are having severe symptoms and/or significant risk requiring immediate intervention were present were exclued
CDRS-R≥30 or RADS-2≥76; self-referred for low mood
MFQ ≥ 20（validation research proposes ≥20 indicates any depressive disorder）; aged 12–18; referred for low mood/depression via primary mental health worker; excluding psychosis and active suicidality
